what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for the work of a commerce broker, and proof that strangers will not make Arbiters Row harder to manage.
what_they_refuse: Casvel Ledgermere refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.

how_they_can_help: Can redirect supply, access networks, and read market pressure clearly.

rumor_about_them: People say Casvel Ledgermere always knows more about Arbiters Row than is immediately visible.
